requirement_topic.en: BEE Star Labelling — Frost-Free and Direct-Cool Refrigerators
requirement_topic.zh: BEE星级标识——无霜和直冷电冰箱
requirement_topic.zht: BEE星級標識——無霜和直冷電冰箱

summary.en: India's Bureau of Energy Efficiency operates the Standards and Labelling programme under the Energy Conservation Act framework. Frost-free refrigerators and direct-cool refrigerators are listed in the mandatory appliance scheme. Manufacturers, importers, or sellers must obtain BEE permission/model registration, use the approved star label, display the label online and offline, and pay applicable labelling fees. The BEE label is separate from BIS safety/market-access approval.
summary.zh: 印度能源效率局依据《能源节约法》框架运行标准与标识计划。无霜电冰箱和直冷电冰箱列入强制性器具计划。制造商、进口商或销售方须取得BEE许可/型号注册，使用获准星级标签，并在线上线下展示标签及缴纳适用标签费用。BEE标签独立于BIS安全/市场准入批准。
summary.zht: 印度能源效率局依據《能源節約法》框架運行標準與標識計畫。無霜電冰箱和直冷電冰箱列入強制性器具計畫。製造商、進口商或銷售方須取得BEE許可/型號登記，使用獲准星級標籤，並在線上線下展示標籤及繳納適用標籤費用。BEE標籤獨立於BIS安全/市場准入批准。

standards_or_laws: Energy Conservation Act, 2001 — legal basis for BEE Standards and Labelling
BEE (Appliance Labelling) Regulations, 2009 — registration, label display, fees, and compliance controls
BEE Mandatory Scheme listing — Frost Free Refrigerators
BEE Mandatory Scheme listing — Direct Cool Refrigerators

summary.en: China uses the China Energy Label system and refrigerator energy grading under GB 12021.2. The label format, grade scale, registration workflow, test method, validity cycle, and surveillance rules differ from India's BEE star labelling programme. A Chinese Grade 1 rating does not automatically convert to a BEE star rating.
summary.zh: 中国采用中国能效标识制度，并依据GB 12021.2进行电冰箱能效等级划分。其标签格式、等级尺度、注册流程、试验方法、有效期和监督规则均不同于印度BEE星级标识计划。中国1级能效不能自动转换为BEE星级。
summary.zht: 中國採用中國能效標識制度，並依據GB 12021.2進行電冰箱能效等級劃分。其標籤格式、等級尺度、登記流程、試驗方法、有效期和監督規則均不同於印度BEE星級標識計畫。中國1級能效不能自動轉換為BEE星級。

standards_or_laws: China Energy Label framework — domestic energy label system
GB 12021.2 — Chinese refrigerator energy-efficiency grade test basis

gap.en: Exporters must re-rate the model under BEE's refrigerator category and current label period. Required work typically includes India-specific model registration, test report mapping, star-rating calculation, label artwork approval, QR/code or label data controls, packaging and e-commerce label display, and fee reporting. Chinese CEL artwork and grade claims should be removed or separated from India-facing consumer claims unless specifically permitted.
gap.zh: 出口商须在BEE电冰箱类别及当前标签周期下重新评级。通常需要完成印度专用型号注册、检测报告映射、星级计算、标签图稿批准、二维码/标签数据控制、包装及电商页面标签展示、费用申报等工作。除非明确允许，中国能效标识图样和等级声明应从面向印度消费者的声明中删除或区分。
gap.zht: 出口商須在BEE電冰箱類別及當前標籤週期下重新評級。通常需要完成印度專用型號登記、檢測報告映射、星級計算、標籤圖稿批准、二維碼/標籤資料控制、包裝及電商頁面標籤展示、費用申報等工作。除非明確允許，中國能效標識圖樣和等級聲明應從面向印度消費者的聲明中刪除或區分。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory under the Energy Conservation Act / BEE (Appliance Labelling) Regulations, 2009 for frost-free and direct-cool refrigerators listed in the BEE mandatory scheme. The specified Indian Standard and BEE schedule requirements are compulsory for products within BEE scope.
mandatory_status.cn: China Energy Label is a China domestic programme and does not substitute for BEE permission or India star label display.

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] BEE star labelling is a separate hard gate for frost-free and direct-cool refrigerators in India. Chinese energy grades do not substitute for BEE model registration, approved India label artwork, point-of-sale display, or BEE compliance reporting.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] BEE星级标识是无霜和直冷电冰箱进入印度市场的独立门槛。中国能效等级不能替代BEE型号注册、获准印度标签图稿、销售点展示或BEE合规申报。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] BEE星級標識是無霜和直冷電冰箱進入印度市場的獨立門檻。中國能效等級不能替代BEE型號登記、獲准印度標籤圖稿、銷售點展示或BEE合規申報。
